summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Fidelity Real Estate Income ETF (FREI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund actively invests in the global real estate sector, seeking higher than average income and capital growth. FREI was launched on Feb 4, 2003 and is issued by Fidelity Advisor.

holdings.infoBox: FREI is an equity ETF with a total of 587 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fidelity Cash Central Fund stock at 4.38%, American Tower at 1.87%, Welltower at 1.67%, Equinix at 1.55%, and Prologis at 1.52%.
